description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages linting, VVP, unit_test, docker, and test, using a global python:latest image and defining variables PIP_CACHE_DIR, SAST_GOSEC_LEVEL, SRC_PATH. Add a markdown_linting job in the linting stage that runs on the vpgrp/linter:markdown image, executes `mdl .`, is tagged gitlab-org, and is excluded from scheduled pipelines; similarly add a yaml_linting job on sdesbure/yamllint:latest that runs `yamllint onap_tests/onap-conf onap_tests/templates/vnf-services` with the same tags and schedule exclusion. In the VVP stage define basic_vm, freeradius_nbi, vfw, vfwcl (allow_failure), and vims jobs, all using the nexus3.onap.org:10001/onap/vvp/validation-scripts image with an empty entrypoint, run a before_script `mkdir -p onap_tests/reports`, and execute `pytest /vvp/tests --template-directory=... --output-directory=onap_tests/reports` with their respective template directories; each stores the onap_tests/reports directory as an always artifact, skips scheduled pipelines, and is tagged gitlab-org. Add a pytest job in the unit_test stage on python:3.6 that runs `pip install -e .` then `python setup.py test`, publishing coverage files and JUnit reports as artifacts. Finally, add docker and docker-master jobs in the docker stage using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, a before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY, and scripts `docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" ./docker/` and `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"` for non‑master branches, and `docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" ./docker/` plus push for the master branch only.
